text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sky, do you have any plans for our day off
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going boat fishing. ♪ I reeled in a whole
bunch last time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry. I must still be a little... troubled from last
time's incident...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Incident?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You hugged Grass and then pinned—I mean,
cornered me up against the wall.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! Yeah, I heard something like that went
down!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! ☆ Sorry about that! I only planned to
tease you two a bit...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But your reaction was just too delicious, Dober.
So I went a little overboard. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You mean you weren't sleepwalking?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, take it easy on us, will you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I won't do it again, so forgive me, okay?
Pretty please?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are you perhaps... feeling under the weather?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I mean... for a trickster such as yourself to
apologize so easily...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Now that's a bit harsh. I'm more than capable of
giving an honest apology.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I suppose. But in those cases, there's always
a catch.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah, you're overthinking it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You see?! Knowing you, just now, I would expect
a, "Oh, so you want me to play a trick on you,"
kind of response!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, you've been acting
strange the whole day. Is there a reason for this?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh... You're right... I do feel a little dizzy,
actually.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! I knew it! Come on, hurry over to the
infirmary already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to be on the same train as
Seiun Sky. She's brought a few fishing goods
along, but her expression reads a little solemn...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I thought I felt a familiar pair of eyes
watching me. Were you smitten by the sight of me
all geared up for fishing?
choice_data_list: Please be careful while you're out there.

I was thinking about the delicious fish you gave
me last time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right on that, haha. And not only
"out there."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah. Nothing. Just talking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Haha, are you perhaps hungering for more?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Well, it's no use thinking about the fish of the
past!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to haul in a bunch more to satisfy that
stomach of yours! ♪
